title: Greek Lentil Stew with Dolmades
description: A hearty and flavorful stew made with red lentils, aromatic spices, and the tangy twist of Greek dolmades.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for another minute.
Add the carrot and cook for 5 minutes.
Add the cumin and oregano, and cook for 1 minute.
Add the tomato paste and cook for 1 minute.
Add the Greek tomato sauce and 2 cups of water.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 20 minutes.
Add the red lentils and dolmades, and cook for another 10 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley.
